provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, gangly teenage reptilian alien with patchy dark green scales that have not fully developed their adult pattern, a crest ridge just starting to grow above the brow line, anxious amber eyes too big for the face, a thin whippy tail that betrays every emotion, wearing a plain dark hide training tunic that is too short because he is growing faster than his clothes can keep up, basic sandals, a practice stick instead of a real weapon, he is all legs and elbows and barely contained energy
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval knight, human face, mammalian features, fur, hair, ears

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
